scripts.test: npm run get-env && start-server-and-test start-vercel http://localhost:3005 ./scripts/test-e2e-with-env.sh
scripts.start-vercel: unset VERCEL VERCEL_URL VERCEL_ENV && node ./node_modules/vercel/dist/vc.js dev --debug --listen 3005 --scope jochenvandenbroele-5976s-projects
scripts.build:js: cat js/ab-test-home.js js/ab-test.js js/accordion.js js/admin-agency-inquiries.js js/agency-billing.js js/agency-form.js js/agency-subscription.js js/analytics.js js/app.js js/audit-form.js js/audit.js js/blog-search.js js/contact.js js/dashboard.js js/generate-form-validation.js js/generate.js js/mobile-swipe-nav.js js/referral-form.js js/social-share.js js/stripe-checkout.js js/testimonial-carousel.js js/tracking.js | ./node_modules/uglify-js/bin/uglifyjs -o js/app.min.js
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run build:css-scroll
